title: Ashen + Mythic Charms Compatibility
description: Ashen Resourcepack addon — adds compatibility with the Mythic Charms mod.
body:
This addon provides modified item textures to ensure compatibility with the Mythic Charms mod while preserving the Ashen resourcepack style.

I also recommend using my [compatibility pack for Trinkets mod](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen-trinkets-compatibility) to make charm slot work correctly.

---

If you encounter any issues, please contact me (sof_izh) on the [Ashen Discord server](https://discord.gg/k5pDjKbhdh). Do not report these issues to Aim_Boot, as this is just a fan-made addon and is not officially affiliated with the main Ashen resourcepack.

---

Credits:
- Aim_Boot – [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen) resourcepack
- masik16u – [Mythic Charms](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythic-charms) mod
